examples: And Twombly did once say, I would have liked to have been Poussin.
On the basis of inheriting the excellent tradition of Poussin and Lorrain s landscape in 17 ~ (th) century, he promoted French realism landscape oil painting forward to a new height.
He drew convincingly as Andrea Mantegna and Nicolas Poussin, Giovanni Battista Piranesi and Peter Paul Rubens, Thomas Gainsborough and Jean-Baptiste-Camille Corot.
